title: Broadcast Announcers and Radio Disc Jockeys
description: Speak or read from scripted materials, such as news reports or commercial messages, on radio, television, or other communications media. May play and queue music, announce artist or title of performance, identify station, or interview guests.

tasks.text: Read news flashes to inform audiences of important events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Announce musical selections, station breaks, commercials, or public service information, and accept requests from listening audience.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate control consoles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify stations, and introduce or close shows, ad-libbing or using memorized or read scripts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study background information to prepare for programs or interviews.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and deliver news, sports, or weather reports, gathering and rewriting material so that it will convey required information and fit specific time slots.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record commercials for later broadcast.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Keep daily program logs to provide information on all elements aired during broadcast, such as musical selections and station promotions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop story lines for broadcasts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select program content, in conjunction with producers and assistants, based on factors such as program specialties, audience tastes, or requests from the public.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write and edit video and scripts for broadcasts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview show guests about their lives, their work, or topics of current interest.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Comment on music and other matters, such as weather or traffic conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make promotional appearances at public or private events to represent their employers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide commentary and conduct interviews during sporting events, parades, conventions, or other events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Host civic, charitable, or promotional events broadcast over television or radio.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate guests to appear on talk or interview shows.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate games, contests, or other on-air competitions, performing such duties as asking questions and awarding prizes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend press conferences to gather information for broadcast.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain organization of the music library.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Discuss various topics over the telephone with viewers or listeners.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Moderate panels or discussion shows on topics such as current affairs, art, or education.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Give network cues permitting selected stations to receive programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Describe or demonstrate products that viewers may purchase through specific shows or in stores.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
